title: mikrotik-routeros provider
description: Native MikroTik RouterOS v7+ REST API OpenTofu/Terraform provider. Generic over the /rest menu tree (routeros_object resource + data source), manage-declared-only drift so existing config imports to 0-diff.

phases.title: Core (generic, full coverage)
phases.exit_criteria: Builds, vets, tests; one resource + data source cover all /rest paths.

items.feature: REST transport (HTTP Basic auth, GET/PUT/PATCH/DELETE/POST, insecure TLS, http|https scheme)
routeros_object resource (CRUD + ImportState; PUT-add captures .id, PATCH update, DELETE; singleton PATCH-path/no-delete)
Manage-declared-only drift: subset plan modifier (declared keys match device -> 0-diff; never clobbers unmanaged fields)

phases.title: Validate against live RouterOS
phases.exit_criteria: A lab RouterOS resource imports to 0-diff through the provider.

items.feature: Provider installable on the Semaphore runner (filesystem_mirror + scoped .terraformrc); tofu init verified
Live import to 0-diff proven against a lab RouterOS box (singleton + collection item) -> tofu plan = No changes
Acceptance tests (TF_ACC) against a throwaway/lab RouterOS

phases.title: Ergonomics + release
phases.exit_criteria: Optional typed sugar; CI; registry publish.

items.feature: Typed sugar resources (address/vlan/firewall-rule/dhcp-lease) over the generic core
CI (build/vet/test) + GoReleaser + registry publish + docs gen
